DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS KUNDAN WALKER-FISHER, KELLY WALKER-FISHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTIFFS' FIRST DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR RELATED RELIEF IS GRANTED AS TO MODIFIED DOCUMENT REQUEST 9. DEFENDANTS SHALL PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AS DEFENDANT SUGGESTED IN THEIR RESPONSE TO THAT REQUEST AND ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS REGARDING CONSTRUCTION OF THE SECOND UNIT. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING DOCUMENT REQUEST 15. DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE POST-TENANCY DOCUMENTS. THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER REGARDING EXACTLY WHICH AGENCY DOCUMENTS SHOULD BE DISCLOSED. THE REQUEST FOR "ALL" MUNICIPAL DOCUMENTS IS OVERBROAD. MOTION GRANTED AS TO MODIFIED DOCUMENT REQUEST 16 AS WRITTEN. DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE POST-TENANCY DOCUMENTS. REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. BOTH PARTIES HAD SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR THEIR POSITIONS. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltfs' First Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And For Related Relief
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bradley J. Jameson of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP (278.9400) for defendant and responding party.

No other appearances. The matter was not argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS KUNDAN WALKER-FISHER, KELLY WALKER-FISHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO COMPLY WITH PLAINTIFFS' FIRST DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR RELATED RELIEF is granted as to modified document request 9. Defendants shall produce documents as defendant suggested in their response to that request and also produce documents regarding construction of the second unit. Parties to meet and confer regarding document request 15. Defendant to produce post-tenancy documents. The parties must meet and confer regarding exactly which agency documents should be disclosed. The request for "all" municipal documents is overbroad. Motion granted as to modified document request 16 as written. Defendant to produce post-tenancy documents. Requests for sanctions denied. Both parties had substantial justification for their positions. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defts To Comply With Pltfs' First Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And For Related Relief
